name: python3-cachecontrol
title: python3-cachecontrol
summary: caching algorithms in httplib2 for use with requests
description:
caching algorithms in httplib2 for use with requests
CacheControl is a port of the caching algorithms in httplib2 for use with
requests session object.
.
It was written because httplib2's better support for caching is often
mitigated by its lack of threadsafety. The same is true of requests in
terms of caching.
.
This is the Python 3 library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cachecontrol because caching algorithms in httplib2 for use with requests.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cachecontrol as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cachecontrol with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cachecontrol --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
